text:
As i was watching this live saw several comments talking about passing the exam.

Only thing on my mind was waiting till i did mine, passed and came back here

And it is with great joy i type that i took my sec+ exam today and passed with 800.
author: @thatfitnessguy-254

text: Thank you so much for the practice group. I passed my exam with 771 . One tip for anyone who is studying for security plus. Go through each and every single video of his practice group. And purchase all his practice tests. These two have been so helpful.
author: @farhanana469

text: Im a veteran in the PACS, IAM field. Got laid off last Feb. Got an offer in May. They required the Sec+. Used your courses exclusively. Passed first try. You’re a god send.
